queries.question: Which mobile banking apps and internet banking platforms allow users to sign in using token-based authentication?
queries.sql:
SELECT MobileBankingApps.name
FROM SignInOptions JOIN MobileBankingApps ON SignInOptions.OptionName = MobileBankingApps.PlatformType
WHERE SignInOptions.OptionName = "Token Based Authentication"
UNION
SELECT InternetBankingPlatforms.name
FROM SignInOptions JOIN InternetBankingPlatforms ON SignInOptions.OptionName = InternetBankingPlatforms.AdditionalFeatures
WHERE SignInOptions.OptionName = "Token Based Authentication"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?o0 WHERE {
  {
    ?signinoptions a :SignInOptions .
    ?mobilebankingapps a :MobileBankingApps .
    ?signinoptions p:OptionName ?optionname_l .
    ?mobilebankingapps p:PlatformType ?platformtype_r .
    ?mobilebankingapps p:name ?name .
    ?signinoptions p:OptionName ?optionname_f .
    FILTER(STR(?optionname_l) = STR(?platformtype_r))
    FILTER(STR(?optionname_f) = "Token Based Authentication")
    BIND(?name AS ?o0)
  }
  UNION
  {
    ?signinoptions a :SignInOptions .
    ?internetbankingplatforms a :InternetBankingPlatforms .
    ?signinoptions p:OptionName ?optionname_l .
    ?internetbankingplatforms p:AdditionalFeatures ?additionalfeatures_r .
    ?internetbankingplatforms p:name ?name .
    ?signinoptions p:OptionName ?optionname_f .
    FILTER(STR(?optionname_l) = STR(?additionalfeatures_r))
    FILTER(STR(?optionname_f) = "Token Based Authentication")
    BIND(?name AS ?o0)
  }
}

queries.question: Show me mobile banking apps and internet banking platforms that use token-based authentication for signing in.
queries.sql:
SELECT MobileBankingApps.name
FROM SignInOptions JOIN MobileBankingApps ON SignInOptions.OptionName = MobileBankingApps.PlatformType
UNION
SELECT InternetBankingPlatforms.name
FROM SignInOptions JOIN InternetBankingPlatforms ON SignInOptions.OptionName = InternetBankingPlatforms.AdditionalFeatures
WHERE SignInOptions.OptionName = "Token Based Authentication"

PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?o0 WHERE {
  {
    ?signinoptions a :SignInOptions .
    ?mobilebankingapps a :MobileBankingApps .
    ?signinoptions p:OptionName ?optionname_l .
    ?mobilebankingapps p:PlatformType ?platformtype_r .
    ?mobilebankingapps p:name ?name .
    FILTER(STR(?optionname_l) = STR(?platformtype_r))
    BIND(?name AS ?o0)
  }
  UNION
  {
    ?signinoptions a :SignInOptions .
    ?internetbankingplatforms a :InternetBankingPlatforms .
    ?signinoptions p:OptionName ?optionname_l .
    ?internetbankingplatforms p:AdditionalFeatures ?additionalfeatures_r .
    ?internetbankingplatforms p:name ?name .
    ?signinoptions p:OptionName ?optionname_f .
    FILTER(STR(?optionname_l) = STR(?additionalfeatures_r))
    FILTER(STR(?optionname_f) = "Token Based Authentication")
    BIND(?name AS ?o0)
  }
}
